Notice Of Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incarceration
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CHERONN JOHNSON Notice Of Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incarceration is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the motion and supporting papers. Contrary to assertion in the Notice of Order to Show Cause filed on November 13, 2013 no Points and Authorities and Affidavit of Benny Martin is attached to that filing. Notice provides hearing time of 9:00 a.m. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Re-Notice Of Motion To Have Trhuth Of Matters Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arlen Litman, Esq. (415-956-9555) for Cheronn Rashida Johnson, Plaintiff and moving party / Gregory Haynes, Esq. (415-546-0777) for Warren Foster, Defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CHERONN JOHNSON's Amended Re-Notice Of Motion To Have Truth Of Matters Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED. Responses to Request for Admissions have been provided prior to hearing. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $550. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT CHERONN JOHNSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Allegations are sufficient re: "breach of contract" and cross-defendant improperly raises issues of fact re: "nuisance" cause of action. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported, (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT CHERONN JOHNSON's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that eviction is landlord's exclusive remedy for damages to the premises. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jun-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT CHERONN JOHNSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Continued to June 27, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date to department 501 no later than June 14, 2013. Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
